places.name: Vindhyachal
places.modernInfo: Main seat of Vindhyavasini Devi. The Devi Mahatmya (Durga Saptashati) was composed here. Part of the Shakti Peetha circuit.

scenes.title: Durga slays Mahishasura
scenes.description: The Markandeya Purana contains the Devi Mahatmya — the glory of the Goddess. The demon Mahishasura had conquered heaven. Durga was born from the combined energy of all gods and fought him for 9 days on the Vindhya mountains before slaying him.

scenes.title: The 9 nights of Navratri
scenes.description: The 9-day battle between Durga and Mahishasura is celebrated as Navratri every year. Each night a different form of the Goddess — Shailputri, Brahmacharini, Chandraghanta... — is worshipped.

places.name: Chamundi Hills
places.modernInfo: Chamundeshwari temple on the hill overlooking Mysuru palace. The demon Mahishasura gave his name to the city — Mahishuru became Mysuru.

scenes.title: Durga becomes Chamundeshwari
scenes.description: After slaying Chanda and Munda, Durga was called Chamunda. She pursued the buffalo demon Mahishasura to these hills and slew him here. The city of Mysuru (Mahishuru) is named after the demon she defeated.
